name: Clawkeeper-Bands
description: User-side bridge and approval plugin for Clawkeeper-connected OpenClaw gateways

enabled.description: Whether to forward agent_end context to a remote clawkeeper-watcher context-judge route

url.description: Base URL for the remote Clawkeeper gateway hosting clawkeeper-watcher, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:19002

token.description: Gateway token for the remote Clawkeeper gateway

model.description: Deprecated. Ignored by the context-judge bridge.

judgePath.description: Relative HTTP path for the remote context-judge endpoint, defaults to /plugins/clawkeeper-watcher/context-judge

systemPrompt.description: Deprecated. Ignored by the context-judge bridge.

userPrompt.description: Deprecated. Ignored by the context-judge bridge.

maxContextChars.description: Maximum serialized context characters forwarded to the remote context-judge

policy.description: Policy hints included in the forwarded context for B to reason over
